title: Next.js Documentation
description: The official Next.js docs. App Router, RSC, caching — the definitive reference.

title: TypeScript Handbook
description: The complete TypeScript reference from the team at Microsoft.

title: Tailwind CSS v4 Docs
description: New @theme syntax, CSS-first config, and all v4 upgrade guides.

title: web.dev by Google
description: Performance, Core Web Vitals, accessibility, and modern web best practices.

title: Josh Comeau's CSS Blog
description: The best interactive CSS deep-dives on the internet. CSS-in-JS, animations, layout.

title: MDN Web Docs
description: The reference for HTML, CSS, and JS. When in doubt, this is the source of truth.

title: Total TypeScript
description: Matt Pocock's free TypeScript tips and exercises — generics, inference, and the type-level tricks docs don't cover.

title: Kent C. Dodds — Epic React & Blog
description: Deep, opinionated React patterns and testing philosophy from someone who's shipped a lot of it.

title: Awesome n8n
description: A curated GitHub list of n8n community nodes, templates, and workflow examples.

title: shadcn/ui
description: Copy-pasteable, unstyled-by-default React components built on Radix — not a dependency, a starting point.

title: Theo — t3.gg
description: Fast-moving takes on the Next.js/React ecosystem, framework tradeoffs, and what's actually worth learning.

title: cubic-bezier.com
description: The original visual cubic-bezier() curve editor — drag two points, copy the timing function.

title: Can I Use
description: Browser support tables for CSS, JS, and web platform features — check before you ship anything cutting-edge.

title: regex101
description: A regex tester with a live explanation panel — the fastest way to debug a pattern that isn't matching.
